DECK._derivation: deck strip beside the stern-ramp slot: inner wall x=-RW=-1.70, outer -dw(u) with flareExp (line 82), u=U0=0.016 to U_RAMP=(RYT+L/2)/L=0.142 (ramp head y=-13.6)
full-width working deck z=DECK=3.5, half-width dw(u) with flareExp (line 82), from the ramp head (u=0.142) to the deckhouse aft wall HYa=1.5 (u=0.539)
DECK._note: obstructions (not holes): split trawl winches x±0.85..±2.85 at y=0.5, fish hatches at y=-3.2/-6.4, net drum x±2.35 at y=-11.3, gantry legs at y=-14.4 (plated gantry legs grown from the bulwarks, x≈±3.0..3.98 with bulwark cheeks x±3.58±0.28, lines 258-274 — they crowd the deck edge at the ramp head)

DECK._derivation: strip between the deckhouse wall x=-HXl=-3.45 and the deck edge -dw(u); clipped to y 1.5..7.146 where the strip is >= 0.25 m wide — it pinches closed toward the house front as the hull narrows
DECK._confirm: the side alleys pinch shut before the foc'sle break: there is NO deck-level route from the trawl deck to the foc'sle — crew pass through the house (side door at y 1.95..2.65). Owner to confirm deck-walking accepts that or the rig grows a passage.
